results.rendered_html:
vigal 1 P.
1 To drop down, get loose; rativigalitavaṃdhe keśahaste sukeśyāḥ  V. 4. 10. 
2 To ooze or trickle.
3 To vanish, disappear.
4 To melt away, be dissolved.
